---
title: "Data Clean Up"
author: "Sarah Moseley"
date: "2026-05-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(digest)

table_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables"

csv_files <- list.files(
  table_dir,
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Inventory every CSV
# ------------------------------------------------------------

safe_read <- function(path) {
  read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
}

file_inventory <- map_dfr(csv_files, function(path) {
  df <- safe_read(path)
  
  tibble(
    file = basename(path),
    size_bytes = file.info(path)$size,
    modified = file.info(path)$mtime,
    n_rows = nrow(df),
    n_cols = ncol(df),
    columns = paste(names(df), collapse = " | "),
    md5_file_hash = digest(file = path, algo = "md5")
  )
})

print(file_inventory, n = Inf)

write_csv(
  file_inventory,
  file.path(table_dir, "AUDIT_file_inventory.csv")
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Compare likely duplicate groups
# ------------------------------------------------------------

compare_csv_pair <- function(file_a, file_b, tolerance = 1e-10) {
  
  path_a <- file.path(table_dir, file_a)
  path_b <- file.path(table_dir, file_b)
  
  if (!file.exists(path_a) || !file.exists(path_b)) {
    return(tibble(
      file_a = file_a,
      file_b = file_b,
      status = "one_or_both_files_missing",
      same_dimensions = NA,
      same_columns = NA,
      same_file_hash = NA,
      same_values = NA
    ))
  }
  
  a <- safe_read(path_a)
  b <- safe_read(path_b)
  
  same_dimensions <- identical(dim(a), dim(b))
  same_columns <- identical(names(a), names(b))
  same_file_hash <- identical(
    digest(file = path_a, algo = "md5"),
    digest(file = path_b, algo = "md5")
  )
  
  same_values <- FALSE
  
  if (same_dimensions && same_columns) {
    comparison <- all.equal(a, b, tolerance = tolerance, check.attributes = FALSE)
    same_values <- isTRUE(comparison)
  }
  
  tibble(
    file_a = file_a,
    file_b = file_b,
    status = case_when(
      same_file_hash ~ "exact_same_file_contents",
      same_values ~ "same_values_after_reading",
      same_dimensions && same_columns ~ "same_shape_columns_but_values_differ",
      same_dimensions && !same_columns ~ "same_shape_but_columns_differ",
      TRUE ~ "different_shape"
    ),
    same_dimensions = same_dimensions,
    same_columns = same_columns,
    same_file_hash = same_file_hash,
    same_values = same_values
  )
}

pairs_to_check <- tribble(
  ~file_a, ~file_b,
  
  "hdbscan_results_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "PRIMARY_hdbscan_assignments_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  
  "hdbscan_results_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "FULL_hdbscan_assignments_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  
  "PRIMARY_hdbscan_assignments_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "FULL_hdbscan_assignments_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  
  "hdbscan_cluster_summary_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "FULL_cluster_summary_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  
  "cluster_mean_spectra_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "clean_cluster_mean_spectra_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  
  "clean_cluster_mean_spectra_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "FULL_cluster_mean_spectra_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv"
)

comparison_results <- pmap_dfr(
  pairs_to_check,
  compare_csv_pair
)

print(comparison_results, n = Inf)

write_csv(
  comparison_results,
  file.path(table_dir, "AUDIT_likely_duplicate_comparisons.csv")
)

```

```{r}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)

table_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables"

old <- read_csv(
  file.path(table_dir, "hdbscan_cluster_summary_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

full <- read_csv(
  file.path(table_dir, "FULL_cluster_summary_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

old_clean <- old %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster))) %>%
  select(HDBSCAN_cluster, n_clicks, percent_clicks, Analysis, minPts)

full_clean <- full %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster))) %>%
  select(HDBSCAN_cluster, n_clicks, percent_clicks, Analysis, minPts)

all.equal(old_clean, full_clean, tolerance = 1e-10)

old %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster))) %>%
  select(HDBSCAN_cluster, cluster_type)

full %>%
  arrange(as.numeric(as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster))) %>%
  select(HDBSCAN_cluster, cluster_type)

```

```{r}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Create curated "Usable tables" folder from scratch
# Primary minPts50 outputs only
# ------------------------------------------------------------

source_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/tables"

usable_dir <- file.path(source_dir, "Usable tables")

# Check that the source folder exists
if (!dir.exists(source_dir)) {
  stop("Source folder does not exist:\n", source_dir)
}

# Create Usable tables folder
dir.create(
  usable_dir,
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

# Curated primary tables only
files_to_copy <- c(
  "FULL_hdbscan_assignments_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "FULL_cluster_summary_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "FULL_ici_summary_by_cluster_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "FULL_cluster_mean_spectra_18PC_scaledICI_1_minPts50.csv",
  "all_clusters_pickpeaks_and_notches_mean_spectra.csv"
)

source_paths <- file.path(source_dir, files_to_copy)
destination_paths <- file.path(usable_dir, files_to_copy)

# Check that all source files exist
missing_files <- files_to_copy[!file.exists(source_paths)]

if (length(missing_files) > 0) {
  stop(
    "These files are missing from the source folder:\n",
    paste(missing_files, collapse = "\n")
  )
}

# Copy files
copied <- file.copy(
  from = source_paths,
  to = destination_paths,
  overwrite = TRUE
)

if (!all(copied)) {
  stop("Some files failed to copy.")
}

# Verify copied files
copied_inventory <- data.frame(
  file = list.files(usable_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = FALSE),
  size_bytes = file.info(
    list.files(usable_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  )$size,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(copied_inventory)

cat("\nCreated folder and copied", nrow(copied_inventory), "usable primary tables to:\n")
cat(usable_dir, "\n")

```
